Row.Text: A communal and hedonistic people who live in tightly bonded Herds, guided by their Leader Horn Mother.
A young and charismatic Horn Mother chosen to lead her Herd. Though many Horn Mothers exist, only one is ever entrusted with guiding the entire Herd as its Leader.
The Horned One thrive through unity, shared pleasure, and communal strength. Their caste system ensures harmony, purpose, and the well-being of the Herd.
+15% Growth in all cities. +20% Production toward land units before the Industrial Era.
A revered matriarch of the Herd. When stationed in a city, she increases its growth and brings harmony to its people.
A unique cultural structure that grows with the population. Provides +2 Culture, +1 Housing, 2 Great Writing slots, and +1 Culture per 3 Population. Gains +1 Culture for each adjacent Nesting Ground.
Sacred nesting grounds where the Herd lays and tends to their eggs. Provides +2 Housing and +1 Food. Gains +1 Food when adjacent to a Horn Mother, and +1 Culture when adjacent to a Herd Tree.
Respects civilizations with strong population growth and disapproves of stagnant ones.
Your people multiply with admirable vigor.
Your cities seem… barren. This concerns me.
The Herd greets you, no-horn. Tread softly—our eggs are precious, and our trust is earned slowly.
You threaten the Herd. Your presence sours the air like a bad egg. We will protect our own.
The Herd scatters… but the cycle of eggs will begin anew. We will rise again.

The MuscleHorns, a caste of towering Oni, serve as hunters, workers, and protectors. Though capable of crushing wood and stone with their bare hands, they are known for their obedience and gentle discipline within the Herd.

A Horn Mother can live between twenty and twenty-five years, laying thousands of eggs throughout her life. While many Horn Mothers exist, only one is chosen as Leader, guiding the Herd with charisma and youthful energy.
The Horn Mother is a young matriarch whose charm and energy unite the Herd. She embodies the joy, sensuality, and communal strength of her people, guiding them with warmth rather than fear.
A small group of young Oni trained for close combat. Their strength is raw, but their discipline is still forming.
A disciplined group of Oni fighters, hardened by ritual combat and Herd tradition.
A large and coordinated battalion of Oni, trained to fight as a unified mass of muscle and discipline.
A seasoned cohort of Oni veterans, capable of overwhelming foes through sheer numbers and relentless pressure.
A massive legion of Oni, drilled to perfection and feared for their unstoppable advance.
A vast horde of Oni warriors, their numbers and discipline replacing the machines other civilizations rely on.
An elite horde of battle-hardened Oni, capable of crushing steel and stone with terrifying unity.
The pinnacle of Oni martial evolution: a colossal, perfectly synchronized fighting force unmatched in raw physical might.
Young Oni trained to hurl stones with surprising force. Crude but effective.
Oni archers who combine brute strength with precision, firing heavy arrows capable of piercing armor.
Crossbow-wielding Oni who unleash powerful bolts with devastating impact.
Elite Oni marksmen trained to fire in coordinated volleys, overwhelming enemies with sheer volume.
A disciplined corps of Oni ranged fighters, replacing firearms with raw strength and perfected technique.
Elite Oni ranged units capable of unleashing devastating synchronized volleys.
A highly trained corps of Oni sharpshooters, their accuracy rivaling the machines of other civilizations.
The ultimate Oni ranged formation, capable of annihilating targets with perfect coordination.
Fast-moving Oni shock troops who break enemy lines with raw momentum.
Mounted Oni fighters who strike with speed and overwhelming force.
Heavily trained Oni shock troops who spearhead assaults with brutal efficiency.
Elite Oni shock units capable of smashing fortified positions through sheer physical might.
A massive formation of Oni heavy troops, their discipline rivaling the armored divisions of other civilizations.
A colossal horde of Oni shock warriors, replacing tanks with living muscle and unstoppable momentum.
A thunderous corps of Oni heavy fighters whose charges shake the battlefield.
The ultimate Oni heavy formation, capable of crushing even mechanized armies through sheer force.
